item.title: word_count
item.description: Vault Stats This vault currently contains 9,558 words across all notes.

item.title: Unlinked_Pages
item.description: Unlinked Notes README Straight ankle lock Buggy choke Close guard overhook stiff Crusifix Baseball choke Collar grip break downward Cross collar grip break to takedown Grip break on upper back Neck related Side shimmy practice S grip Leg drag Knee slice Double ankle grab pass Toreando Closed guard s...

item.title: Empty_Pages
item.description: Empty Notes Canto choke Gogoplata Kimura Figure-four grip North south Rubber guard Double leg .

item.title: Recently_Updated
item.description: Recently Updated Notes index Triangle Triangle Escape Straight jacket from back Windshield wiper choke Three sisters Two grip choke on turtle Lockdown Sweep John Wayne sweep Sweep .

item.title: BJJ journey
item.description: Author I am a 34 year old white belt, who started 08/2023.

item.title: Pressure
item.description: When in Knee on belly, Turtle, Mount your need to remember to apply constant pressure to prevent opponent from moving and giving them ground for free.

item.title: Granby roll
item.description: When in Turtle and opponent is on side and not applying constant pressure you can roll over shoulder that is on the opponents side and regain Open guard.

item.title: Turtle
item.description: Lessons learned from attacker side: Pressure Turtle defence Variant of turtle is Panda Always have the hook and rolling direction be opposite sides! Starting positions Rear Side Reverse (Head) Attack targets Isolate hand for a forward arc roll Unbalance to gain a Hook Attack patterns Armbar / Sweep ...

item.title: Base
item.description: General Imagine that you have a direct line outward from the center of your torso. That is zone where you can influence your opponent the most.

item.title: Flat on back
item.description: If opponent is trying to lift you from your back a general defence to make yourself heavier is the straighten the back against the floor.
